---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for TurboFiles
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's currently hard or missing? (e.g. "When I
transfer many files over SFTP, I can't …")

## Proposed solution

What would you like TurboFiles to do? Describe the behavior or UI you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you use today, or other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Protocol (SFTP / FTP / FTPS), OS, screenshots, or links that help explain the request.
